history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell directly ahead is lava (L), so I cannot move forward. Turning right will make me face down, and then I can move down to row 03 column B which is safe floor. This will get me closer to the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing down. The cell directly below (row 03, col B) is a floor cell, so moving forward is safe. My plan is to go down to row 03, then turn right to face east, then move right twice to reach row 03, col D, then move down to the goal at row 04, col D, avoiding the lava at row 02, col C and row 04, col C.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04 column D. To reach it, I need to go right twice to row 03 column D, then down. Directly moving downwards would lead to a dead end because row 04 column C is lava. So I should first turn left to face right, then move forward to cell (3,C).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3, column B, facing right. The goal is at row 4, column D. I can move forward to cell (3, C) which is empty, then continue forward to (3, D), then turn right to face down, and finally move forward to the goal. The next safe step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03, column C, facing right. The goal is at row 04, column D. Moving forward would take me to (03, D), which is an empty cell. Then I can turn right to face down and move to the goal. So the immediate action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03, column D, facing right (>). The goal is at row 04, column D, directly below me. I need to turn right to face down, then move forward onto the goal cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D facing down (`v`). The goal is directly below me at row 04 column D. The cell ahead is the goal cell. So I can move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
